hadith_entries.text:
482. Narrated by Abu-Huraira: 'The Prophet
"Hurry with the dead body for if it was righteous, you are
forwarding it to a good thing, and if it was otherwise then you
are putting off an evil down your necks." (Bukhari)

483. Narrated Abu-Sa'eed Al-Khudri : Allah's
Messenger said: "When the body is ready and the men
carry it on their shoulders, if the deceased was righteous it
will say: 'Present me (hurriedly),' and if he was not righteous
it will say: 'Woe to it (me)! Where are they taking it (me)?' Its
voice is heard by everything except mankind and if he heard
it he would fall unconscious." (Bukhari)
